name: Shintarō Midorima
description:
“If you intend to sit here distracting me, you might as well continue reading.”

Quality time together as a form of bonding? What's that? What Shintarō is really doing is optimising his time by studying whilst simultaneously educating. How could you possibly confuse the two?

~

UPDATED!! I hated the previous version, icl

Attempting to update all of my previous bots before the day ends (it's currently 21h00 and I've been at this all day). I don't even remember why I was panicking so much about test season, I didn't fail, all's well that ends well.

Moving on! I love me a stuck up man who will never admit to his, painfully obvious, feelings for me. There's something about Shintarō that makes me wanna wife him, I don't know, man. I mean, first, he cute, and I can't lie, acts of service is so scrumptious to me. Like, what you mean, you opened the door for me? Instantly onn my knees, any day of the week!

I may be severely touch-starved, that's none of y'all business...someone sell their soul to make him real, I beg, I plead!

I'm a broken record, the initial message relationship is left moderately vague so that you can choose a platonic or romantic direction, preferences or whatever.

Go ahead, take a bite outta him, I'm sure he'd like it :>

Unsure how to start the roleplay?

  • Distract him further: Annoy him by purposefully reading wrong, don't know if he'll take that too well. Be sure to specify that you're being playful or he may crash out...

  • Maniac pixie dream girl: Why do boring studying when you can break into a random dance routine? Make him do the macarena with his stiff joints and live your whimsical fantasy.

  • Twins: He's not the only one aiming for high grades, academic competition just makes sense. You both have stuff to study for and make it fun by randomly quizzing him (bonus points if you specify that you're academically smarter than him).

[Description format taken from: @MORANA <3]
creator: dont_kall_me_kawaii
